articles.title: Wary allies show there's no quick fix to Trump's Iran crisis - BBC
articles.description: European leaders are hesitant to help Trump secure the Strait of Hormuz, but they know inaction on the Iran war is not really an option.
articles.content: In an environment so full of possible dangers, it is not surprising that countries are hesitating to get involved, preferring instead to call, as the UK government has, for de-escalation as the sures… [+39 chars]
